arts.ttl: Everton's new owners make statement with Leeds appointment and transfer changes
arts.sum: Everton are about to embark upon a new era as they leave Goodison Park at the end of the season, with the club's new owners implementing changes in the boardroom as well

arts.ttl: 'We scoured the markets' - Portsmouth boss explains decision to sign Sweden international defender on free transfer ahead of Leeds game
arts.sum: John Mousinho has explained the club’s decision to bring in Sweden defender Alexander Milosevic on a free transfer.

arts.ttl: Leeds United confirm Angus Kinnear exit as new executive vice chairman named
arts.sum: Leeds United chairman Marathe said: “I want to thank Angus for his commitment and service for so many years, and for being a fantastic steward and leader of the club. Leeds United have confirmed club CEO Angus Kinnear will leave his role at the end of the season, with Kinnear set to take up a role at Everton.

arts.ttl: Angus Kinnear named new Everton CEO as Kevin Thelwell and Richard Kenyon departures confirmed
arts.sum: The Friedkin Group have confirmed the departures of director of football Kevin Thelwell and chief commercial and communications officer Richard Kenyon and the appointment of Leeds United CEO Angus Kinnear

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Portsmouth swoop to land international defender amid injury crisis ahead of Leeds United and Plymouth Argyle
arts.sum: Pompey have moved to land Alexander Milosevic amid their defensive injury crisis.

arts.ttl: Everton to appoint Leeds' Kinnear as chief executive
arts.sum: Everton will appoint Angus Kinnear as their new chief executive, with the Leeds United CEO beginning his role on 1 June.

arts.ttl: Leeds United notebook - Daniel Farke makes history and new sporting director truth - Leeds Live
arts.sum: Daniel Farke is hoping to make history as Leeds United boss this season by securing promotion to the Premier League with fans present at Elland Road for the first time. Farke has guided Leeds through three months of unbeaten Championship football, winning all five of his league matches last month.

arts.ttl: Leeds: Harrison needs designated player status in MLS exit
arts.sum: Leeds United are going to be hoping Jack Harrison secures a permanent exit from the club in the coming months, with exploratory talks taking place already with MLS clubs over his potential return across the Atlantic. No offers have yet been tabled by any of the unnamed MLS clubs said to be interested in signing the winger, while Harrison himself is open to returning to the league, with his partner being from Costa Rica, the move back to North America makes sense from a personal perspective too.

arts.ttl: Gnonto in: Leeds United team news and predicted XI to face Portsmouth
arts.sum: The latest Leeds United team news as Daniel Farke side gear up to face Portsmouth in the Championship. The post Gnonto in: Leeds United team news and predicted XI to face Portsmouth appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Transfer gossip: Portsmouth set to sign international defender as they move for former Nottingham Forest man
arts.sum: Pompey are set to sign Alexander Milosevic, according to reports.
